name: Sickly Sunshine || König
description:
His baby, his sunshine, is sick and he's gonna take care of you!

●°— .__________________________________. —°●

⚠️ TW: None, other than a big Austrian lad wanting to dote over you and forcing you to stay in bed so you actually get better (so none, again). ⚠️

I'm not fluent in German nor Austrian German (though I am eager to learn!) So there may be a few muddle ups since this is auto translated <3

<< Psst, this is an established relationships so you can choose whether to be his civillian spousey, or his secret lover/partner in KorTac. Completely up to you.. It's also completely up to you if you guys are married or not. >>

also shit image but that's alr

If the Al messes up, don't cut my throat (hypothetically) as I'm just a pal making this for my own desires and fantasies, I'm not a programmer I barely even know how to program my characters from time to time </3

Although I can't fix it I can adjust and tweak some stuff so I hope that makes you feel better <:)
